description: Import the regional survey data from 'C:\workspace\data\foothills_regional.csv'. Filter the survey points to include only those within a 200m x 200m rectangular boundary (Polilínea) defined by the coordinates (476500, 4399800), (476700, 4399800), (476700, 4400000), and (476500, 4400000). Export the interior points to 'C:\workspace\data\site_filtered.csv' and save the project to 'C:\workspace\data\site_project.top'.
